title: mathaq #4985
definition:
1) to be or become sweet or pleasing
    1a) (Qal)
        1a1) to be or become sweet
        1a2) to be or become pleasant
        1a3) to suck
    1b) (Hiphil) to give sweet taste
nasbUsage:

    1a) (Qal)
        1a1) to be or become sweet
        1a2) to be or become pleasant
        1a3) to suck
    1b) (Hiphil) to give sweet taste

    NASB:  to become or be sweet or pleasant
